metadata.name: Skip Giantbook Animations
metadata.description:
The unskippable z...z...z... animation when you sleep in a bed has always annoyed me. This mod allows you to press A on your controller or enter/space on your keyboard to skip the animation. You can also press the drop key. As an added bonus, all other [url=https://repentogon.com/enums/Giantbook.html]giantbook[/url] animations can be skipped as well.
This mod requires REPENTOGON.
[hr][/hr] After I wrote this, I discovered that another version of this mod already exists: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3638449856]Giant Book Skipper[/url]. The code's different enough that I still decided to release my version, but feel free to use whichever one you want.
There's also a similar [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3486542328]Customisable Giantbook Disabler[/url] mod.
